headline: Leidos and The Modern Data Company to Organize Fragmented Federal Data Into Actionable Insights
summary: RESTON, Va. & PALO ALTO, Calif., June 25, 2026--Federal agencies are under pressure to deliver faster insights, stronger governance, and capabilities to support AI and analytics, but critical data often remains trapped across disconnected systems. Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) and The Modern Data Company are partnering to help agencies connect, organize and apply that data without major system overhauls.
